heading: Hi-Desert Water District in Yucca Valley, California wastewater collection and reuse facility
label: 390h–12l Hi-Desert Water District in Yucca Valley, California wastewater collection and reuse facility

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the appropriate State and local authorities, is authorized to participate in the design, planning, and construction of the Hi-Desert Water District in Yucca Valley, California wastewater collection and reuse facility.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: b Cost share
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of a project described in subsection (a) shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall not provide funds for the operation or maintenance of a project described in subsection (a).
